events.label: reasoning
events.text:
The scenario describes a panelboard installation that is "less tidy" than preferred but matches listed product instructions and project requirements, with no local amendment forbidding it. The work is in-progress. No defects or hazards are flagged. The references (NEC Art. 408, 110.26, 200.4) don't indicate any violations based on the description.

This should be a pass — the field method is compliant with product instructions and code, just less tidy. Risk is low. Work is in-progress, so percent_complete maybe 50. No component conditions apply.
